projects.title: QuickLink
projects.description: A personal read-it-later tool that uses AI to auto-generate descriptions for saved links, so you can actually find them again.

projects.title: Secure Chat
projects.description: Real-time full-stack chat platform with JWT auth, GitHub OAuth, and WebSocket messaging via SignalR. Containerised with Docker and deployed via NGINX.

projects.title: ExcelToWordProcessor
projects.description: A self-contained Windows CLI tool that reads an Excel file and populates Word document content controls using OpenXML SDK.
